---
title: Programming with Cubes
subtitle: TRIPLE, 2026
date: Mar 29, 2026
date-format: medium
author:
  - name: Vikraman Choudhury
    orcid: 0000-0003-2030-8056
    email: vikraman.choudhury@strath.ac.uk
    affiliations:
      - MSP, University of Strathclyde, Glasgow, UK
  - name: Rin Liu
    email: rin.liu@strath.ac.uk
    affiliations:
      - MSP, University of Strathclyde, Glasgow, UK
format:
  revealjs:
    theme: solarized
    incremental: true
    slide-number: true
    smaller: true
    progress: true
filters:
  - imagify
imagify:
  embed: true
  header-includes: |
    \usepackage{tikz,quiver}
    \usetikzlibrary{automata, positioning}
---

## Outline

- Introduction to Path Types
- Composition and Filling
- Lists
- Symmetric Lists
